description: Happy path for typo robustness: instruction has multiple misspellings ('Trasfer', 'resevoir', 'destintion', 'tipp', 'templete', 'sorce', 'useing'). The LLM should still extract a valid spec preserving both volumes (50 and 5 uL). Tests that the extraction layer is robust to noisy real-world input typical of lab-bench typing.
